name: Hormozi Leads OS
setup_instructions: 1. Go to chat.qwenlm.ai OR Alibaba Cloud DashScope console
2. Paste all of qwen/system-prompt.md as the system prompt
3. Use qwen2.5-72b-instruct for best results; qwen-max for highest quality
4. For multilingual use: Qwen responds in the language you write in
5. Test with a real business problem in your niche
